message:
fix(fp-frame): filter non-numeric columns in corr/cov pairwise_stat

DataFrame.corr() and DataFrame.cov() now skip non-numeric columns
(Utf8, Bool) matching pandas behavior, instead of including them as
all-NaN columns in the correlation/covariance matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
